input.user_input: Add a cure period of 15 business days to the breach provision in Section 6. Right now it allows immediate termination with no opportunity to cure.

actual: I do not currently have access to the document you are referring to. Please upload the document, and I will gladly update Section 6 to include the 15-business-day cure period for breaches.
